classes.name: pytigon.prj._schdata.schdoc.models.DocDef
documentation:
Declaration:
    return Form()

Template: django template

child(name):
    child_header(name)
    child_table(name)

    <html></html>



to_html:
    convert form data to html

functions.name: pytigon.prj._schbi.bi.models.refresh_data
documentation:
refresh_type:
    begin - on the start
    before - before every request
    after - after every request

    bi_sheduler_1 - defined by user, handled by django-q sheduler
    ...
    bi_sheduler_9 - defined by user, handled by django-q sheduler

methods.name: pytigon.appdata.plugins.standard.webview.cef.cefcontrol.ClientHandler.OnLoadingStateChange
documentation:
For detecting if page loading has ended it is recommended
to use OnLoadingStateChange which is most reliable. The OnLoadEnd
callback also available in LoadHandler can sometimes fail in
some cases e.g. when image loading hangs.

functions.name: pytigon.schserw.schsys.context_processors.sch_standard
documentation:
Context processor function

Args:
    requst - django reuqest

Returns dict with vars:
    standard_web_browser - 0 - wxPython client, 1 - standard browser, 2 - hybrid (webkit embeded in wxPython
    application, 3 - webkit in wxPython frame (no hybrid), 5 - render only content (for javascript ajax),
    6 - render only table content (for javascript ajax)

    app_manager - AppManager(request)browser_type=1

    form_edit - True if request in edit mode

    form_add - True if request in new form mode,

    form_delete - True if request in delete mode

    form_ext -  True if request in form mode

    form_list - True if request in list view mode

    readonly - True if readonly mode

    ro - '_' in readonly mode else ''

    form_info - True if request in form info mode

    form_grid - True if request in form grid mode

    URL_ROOT_FOLDER - url root folder

    URL_BASE - url base folder

    show_form - True if request in show form mode

    browser_type - 'desktop_standard', 'tablet_standard', 'smartfon_standard', 'schweb'

    application_type - 'standard',

    default_template - default template for browser

    default_template2 - default template for browser

    prj_name - prj name

    prj_title - prj title

    show_title_bar - show title bar

    get - True if request in get mode

    settings - settings module

    uuid - uniquie id

    lang: two letters language

    DEBUG: settings.DEBUG

modules.name: pytigon.ext_lib.pygettext
documentation: Minimally patched to make it even more xgettext compatible
Added checks that _() only contains string literals, and
command line args are resolved to module lists, i.e. you
can now pass a filename, a module or package name, or a
directory (including globbing chars, important for Win32).
Made docstring fit in 80 chars wide displays using pydoc.

functions.name: pytigon.ext_lib.pygettext.containsAny
documentation: Check whether 'str' contains ANY of the chars in 'set'

functions.name: pytigon.ext_lib.pygettext.getFilesForName
documentation:
Get a list of module files for a filename, a module or package name,
or a directory.

methods.name: pytigon.ext_lib.autocomplete.TextCtrlAutoComplete.__init__
documentation:
Constructor works just like wx.TextCtrl except you can pass in a
list of choices.  You can also change the choice list at any time
by calling setChoices.

methods.name: pytigon.ext_lib.autocomplete.TextCtrlAutoComplete.onKeyDown
documentation:
Do some work when the user press on the keys:
up and down: move the cursor
left and right: move the search

methods.name: pytigon.ext_lib.autocomplete.TextCtrlAutoComplete.SetChoices
documentation:
Sets the choices available in the popup wx.ListBox.
The items will be sorted case insensitively.

methods.name: pytigon.ext_lib.autocomplete.TextCtrlAutoComplete._setValueFromSelected
documentation:
Sets the wx.TextCtrl value from the selected wx.ListCtrl item.
Will do nothing if no item is selected in the wx.ListCtrl.

methods.name: pytigon.ext_lib.autocomplete.TextCtrlAutoComplete._showDropDown
documentation: Either display the drop down list (show = True) or hide it (show = False).

methods.name: pytigon.ext_lib.autocomplete.TextCtrlAutoComplete._listItemVisible
documentation: Moves the selected item to the top of the list ensuring it is always visible.

methods.name: pytigon.ext_lib.autocomplete.test.onBtDynamicChoices
documentation:
Demonstrate dynamic adjustment of the auto-complete list, based on what's
been typed so far:

methods.name: pytigon.ext_lib.autocomplete.test.match
documentation:
Demonstrate "smart" matching feature, by ignoring http:// and www. when doing
matches.

methods.name: pytigon.ext_lib.autocomplete.test.selectCallback
documentation:
Simply function that receive the row values when the
user select an item
